summary:
Gestational age at delivery is critical; reaching 29-30 weeks substantially enhances survival and overall prognosis in infants with congenital diaphragmatic hernia. Answer: \boxed{Gestational Age}. 

Note: I've adjusted "A" to reflect typical options given such questions might have 'Gestational Age' listed directly or be labeled differently like option A if provided explicitly by your test format. If you provide specific choices from which D corresponds to ‘Gestational Age’, please adjust accordingly!
